scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production npm run prisma:generate && NODE_ENV=production npm run build:backend && NODE_ENV=production tsc && NODE_ENV=production vite build
scripts.vercel-build: NODE_ENV=production npm run prisma:generate && mkdir -p backend/node_modules/.prisma && cp -r node_modules/.prisma/client backend/node_modules/.prisma/client && NODE_ENV=production vite build
scripts.dev:api:test: NODE_ENV=test APP_MODE=MOCK ENABLE_TEST_MODE=true PORT=${PORT:-3001} npx tsx backend/src/server.ts
scripts.test:audit: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test tests/audit.spec.ts
scripts.test:coverage:flow: npx vitest run src/tests/buscadorFlow.test.ts src/tests/guardiaoFlow.test.ts src/tests/santuarioFlow.test.ts src/tests/chatFlow.test.ts src/tests/paymentFlow.test.ts --coverage --coverage.provider=v8 --coverage.include=src/flow/**/*.ts --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/flow
scripts.test:coverage:layers: npm run test:coverage:services && npm run coverage:check:services && npm run test:coverage:controllers && npm run coverage:check:controllers && npm run test:coverage:flow && npm run coverage:check:flow
scripts.test:contracts: npx vitest run backend/src/tests/checkout.schema.test.ts backend/src/tests/interactionReceipt.service.test.ts backend/src/tests/auth.service.test.ts backend/src/tests/runtimeGuard.test.ts backend/src/tests/records.controller.test.ts backend/src/tests/auth.middleware.test.ts
scripts.test:qa: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts
scripts.test:qa:core: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts --grep-invert "@stress|@visual|@debug" --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:core:critical: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR STRICT_RECORD_CONSENT=true JWT_SECRET=viva360_test_jwt_secret_2026 npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/consent-records.spec.ts qa/flows/interaction-contracts.spec.ts qa/flows/oracle-flow.spec.ts qa/flows/tribo-support-chat.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:visual: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts --project=chromium --grep @visual
scripts.test:qa:stress: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts --grep @stress
scripts.test:qa:consent: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR STRICT_RECORD_CONSENT=true JWT_SECRET=viva360_test_jwt_secret_2026 npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/consent-records.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:deeplinks: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/deeplinks.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:a11y-smoke: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/accessibility-smoke.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:a11y-operational: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/accessibility-operational.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:a11y-advanced: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/accessibility-advanced.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:qa:read-resilience: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/read-resilience.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:buscador-flow: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/buscador-flow.spec.ts
scripts.test:guardiao-flow: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/guardiao-flow.spec.ts
scripts.test:santuario-flow: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/santuario-flow.spec.ts
scripts.test:debug: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR npx playwright test --config=playwright.qa.config.ts qa/flows/debug-guardiao.spec.ts
scripts.supabase:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npx tsx scripts/setup_db.ts
scripts.supabase:verify: npm run prisma:generate && npx tsx scripts/verify_supabase.ts
